chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3282 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.14141/2025 3. For hearing of main case 06.08.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Mashori, advocate for the petitioners alongwith petitioners Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG Mr. Qamaruddin, DPG PI/SHO Ghous Bux, SIP Farhan Ali and I.O Rana Muhammad Nazeer, PS Ibrahim Hyderi Inv.II District Malir Karachi --------- I.O Rana Muhammad Nazeer, PS Ibrahim Hyderi Inv.II District Malir Karachi is present in Court and states that he has recorded the 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Areesha and on the basis of that statement he undertakes to file report in ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate. He shall ensure to do so within 03 days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge Nadir*
